question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention any chapters or the structural components of the thesis. It focuses entirely on the problem statement and the research objective.

question: Description
feedback: While the text describes the research problem and the technical approach, it fails to describe the contents of the thesis sections (e.g., literature review, methodology, results, or conclusion).

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not presented. The reader knows the technical problem being addressed, but does not know how the thesis is organized or what the logical flow of the work will be.
